codes.title: Ultimate Gym Game Codes
codes.intro: Ultimate Gym Game does not currently list any public reward codes or an in-game code redemption menu. Players can follow the developer's Roblox community and Discord server for future codes, update rewards and limited-time bonuses.

items.reward: No public code rewards are available
items.action: Follow the official community channels for new reward announcements.

items.reward: No redemption menu is currently listed
items.action: A future code system would normally appear through a Codes, Gift or Settings button inside the game.
Join UGG - Gym Simulator on Roblox.

items.reward: Update news, community posts and possible event rewards

beginnerGuide.title: Ultimate Gym Game Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: Ultimate Gym Game combines weight training, visible muscle growth, personal records and nutrition. New players should select a training goal, use manageable weights, progress through exercises and reinvest earned cash into food, supplements and training buffs.

steps.title: Choose a Training Goal
steps.description: Decide whether you want to prioritize heavier lifts, muscle growth or longer training sessions. Use the Strength, Hypertrophy or Endurance zone that matches that goal.
steps.tip: Start with one goal instead of switching zones after every exercise.

steps.title: Begin With Core Exercises
steps.description: Use accessible exercises such as Bench Press, Squat, Deadlift, Cable Machines or Dumbbells to begin building your character.
steps.tip: Compound lifts are useful starting choices because they cover major muscle groups and support strength progression.

steps.title: Increase Weight Gradually
steps.description: Complete successful training sessions before moving to heavier weights. Use personal records to track improvements instead of selecting the heaviest load immediately.
steps.tip: A manageable weight provides steadier progress than repeatedly failing a lift.

steps.title: Earn and Spend Cash
steps.description: Continue training to earn cash, then use it on food, supplements and other progression items available inside the gym.
steps.tip: Prioritize items that support your main training goal before buying optional extras.

steps.title: Prepare Shaker Buffs
steps.description: Combine compatible food and supplement effects through the shaker system, then manage the resulting items through your inventory.
steps.tip: Use training buffs before a focused lifting session so their effects support multiple exercises.

steps.title: Build Records and Rank
steps.description: Improve personal records, move through the overhead rank titles from Beginner toward Grand Master and compare your progress on the global leaderboards.
steps.tip: Consistent increases across several exercises create more reliable progress than focusing on only one lift.

exerciseTierList.title: Ultimate Gym Game Exercise Tier List
exerciseTierList.intro: Ultimate Gym Game includes more than 31 exercises, ranging from major barbell lifts to machines, dumbbells and advanced calisthenics. This ranking prioritizes exercises that provide broad progression, clear personal-record goals and useful options across the three training zones.

tiers.label: Core Progression
tiers.bestFor: Strength progression, personal records and major muscle groups
tiers.summary: The three headline compound lifts provide clear weight progression and are strong choices for players building an all-around training base.

tiers.label: Flexible Muscle Training
tiers.summary: Cable and dumbbell exercises offer flexible movement choices and help players train muscles that receive less direct attention from the main compound lifts.

tiers.label: Bodyweight Progression
tiers.summary: Pull-ups and dips are useful bodyweight exercises that support upper-body development and prepare players for the advanced calisthenics path.

tiers.label: Advanced Calisthenics
tiers.bestFor: Long-term bodyweight mastery and endgame goals
tiers.summary: The calisthenics route culminates in the legendary Maltese, making it a valuable long-term challenge after establishing basic strength and training resources.

trainingZones.title: Ultimate Gym Game Training Zones
trainingZones.intro: The gym is divided into three training zones designed around different progression goals. Strength supports heavier lifting, Hypertrophy focuses on muscle growth, and Endurance supports longer training performance.

zones.recommendedFor: Players who want to improve their best lifts and climb strength-based records
zones.progressSignal: Higher successful lifting weight and improved personal records

zones.trainingFocus: Building visible muscle through consistent exercise work
zones.recommendedFor: Players focused on growing their character and creating a balanced physique
zones.progressSignal: Continued muscle development across trained body areas

zones.recommendedFor: Players who want longer sessions and improved repeated-effort performance
zones.progressSignal: More sustained training before performance drops

bulkAndCutGuide.title: Ultimate Gym Game Bulk and Cut Guide
bulkAndCutGuide.intro: Ultimate Gym Game lets players grow muscle, increase strength and switch between bulking and cutting. A simple approach is to establish reliable lifts first, spend a focused period building size, and cut only after reaching a physique or strength milestone.

phases.goal: Create measurable progress before selecting a long-term body phase.
actions: Train major exercises such as Bench Press, Squat and Deadlift.
Use the Strength or Hypertrophy training zone instead of changing routines constantly.
Record your current personal records so later progress is easy to compare.
phases.checkpoint: Move forward after you have a stable routine and can regularly improve your main lifts.

phases.goal: Prioritize muscle size while continuing to increase training weight.
actions: Select the bulk option when visible size and muscle growth are your main goals.
Spend most sessions in the Hypertrophy zone while keeping compound lifts in the routine.
Use food, supplements and shaker buffs during longer training sessions.
phases.checkpoint: Continue until you reach your chosen size target or your strength progress begins to slow.

phases.goal: Avoid gaining size without improving useful gym performance.
actions: Keep Bench Press, Squat and Deadlift in regular rotation.
Check personal records instead of judging progress only by character size.
Use the Strength zone periodically to test heavier weights.
phases.checkpoint: A productive bulk should improve both muscle growth and at least some major lift records.

phases.goal: Reduce body size or improve definition while protecting previous strength gains.
actions: Switch to cutting after completing a clear bulking milestone.
Continue strength-focused exercises rather than replacing the entire routine with endurance work.
Review body appearance and personal records before deciding whether to bulk again.
phases.checkpoint: Finish the cut when the desired physique is reached, then return to a focused strength or muscle-building phase.

foodAndSupplementsGuide.title: Ultimate Gym Game Food and Supplements Guide
foodAndSupplementsGuide.intro: Cash can be spent on food and supplements, while the shaker system allows training buffs to be mixed and used together. The best purchases are the ones that support an active workout plan rather than sitting unused in the inventory.

items.purpose: Main currency used to purchase food and supplements.
items.bestTiming: Save it until you know which exercise, zone or progression goal you are training next.
items.spendingAdvice: Keep enough cash for useful repeat purchases instead of spending the full balance immediately.
items.avoid: Buying several buffs before testing whether they help your normal workout route.

items.purpose: Provides training-related buffs that support muscle and general gym progression.
items.bestTiming: Use shortly before a planned lifting session.
items.spendingAdvice: Choose food when you have enough time to complete several exercises while the buff is useful.
items.avoid: Activating food immediately before leaving the server or changing activities.

items.purpose: Adds extra progression bonuses that can be combined with a focused training routine.
items.bestTiming: Use during personal-record attempts, long hypertrophy sessions or advanced exercise progression.
items.spendingAdvice: Buy supplements after establishing a reliable way to earn cash and a repeatable workout route.
items.avoid: Treating supplements as a replacement for increasing weight and completing exercises.

items.purpose: Mixes compatible buffs into a convenient training setup.
items.bestTiming: Prepare the shaker before entering the training zone you plan to use.
items.priority: High once multiple buffs are available
items.spendingAdvice: Combine buffs around one clear goal such as strength, hypertrophy or endurance.
items.avoid: Mixing bonuses without enough cash or session time to benefit from them.

items.purpose: Stores purchased progression items and other usable equipment.
items.bestTiming: Review it before buying additional food or supplements.
items.spendingAdvice: Use existing items first and restock only the buffs used by your regular routine.
items.avoid: Repurchasing items that are already available in the inventory.

calisthenicsProgressionGuide.title: Ultimate Gym Game Calisthenics Progression Guide
calisthenicsProgressionGuide.intro: Ultimate Gym Game includes more than 31 exercises and a dedicated calisthenics path. Pull-Ups and Dips provide the foundation, while later stages require stronger overall performance before reaching the legendary Maltese.

stages.name: Pull-Up Foundation
trainingPlan: Start with the available Pull-Up variation.
Complete consistent repetitions before moving to harder calisthenics content.
Use regular weight training to strengthen the back and arms alongside Pull-Ups.
stages.milestone: Reliable Pull-Up completions without interrupting the exercise.

stages.name: Dip Foundation
trainingPlan: Add Dips after establishing basic pulling strength.
Alternate Pull-Ups and Dips to develop both sides of the upper body.
Support progress with Bench Press, Dumbbells or Cable Machine exercises.
stages.milestone: Consistent performance on both Pull-Ups and Dips.

stages.name: Advanced Calisthenics
stages.exercise: Higher-level movements in the calisthenics progression
trainingPlan: Continue through the in-game calisthenics path in its displayed order.
Return to Strength and Hypertrophy zones when an advanced movement becomes difficult.
Increase general strength through Squat, Deadlift, Bench Press, Dumbbells and Cable Machines.
stages.milestone: Complete the advanced movements that appear before the final Maltese stage.

stages.name: Final Calisthenics Milestone
trainingPlan: Attempt the Maltese after completing the earlier calisthenics stages.
Use food, supplement and shaker buffs for dedicated progression sessions.
Keep improving personal records when additional strength is needed.
stages.milestone: Complete the Maltese and finish the current calisthenics progression.

updatesAndPatchNotes.title: Ultimate Gym Game Updates and Patch Notes
updatesAndPatchNotes.intro: The live version is marked as an update build and receives frequent fixes. Current features cover more than 31 exercises, three training zones, body progression, calisthenics, leaderboards, consumable buffs and support for desktop, mobile and console players.

entries.title: Expanded Gym and Exercise Selection
changes: Confirmed equipment includes Bench Press, Squat, Deadlift, Cable Machines and Dumbbells.
Bodyweight exercises include Pull-Ups, Dips and a calisthenics progression ending with the Maltese.
entries.impact: Players can combine powerlifting, machine training, dumbbell work and calisthenics instead of relying on a single exercise.

entries.title: Training and Body Progression Systems
changes: Real muscle growth and strength progression are active.
Separate Strength, Hypertrophy and Endurance training zones are available.
Players can use bulking and cutting as part of body progression.
entries.impact: Workout routes can be organized around heavier lifts, muscle growth or endurance rather than repeating every exercise equally.

entries.title: Records, Rankings and Competition
changes: Personal records track individual lifting progress.
Overhead rank titles progress from Beginner through Grand Master.
entries.impact: Personal records provide a direct way to measure improvement, while rankings create longer-term progression goals.

entries.title: Cash, Food and Supplement Systems
changes: Cash can be earned and spent on progression items.
Food and supplements provide training buffs.
Buffs can be mixed through the shaker system.
Purchased items can be managed through the inventory.
entries.impact: Saving cash and activating buffs before focused sessions can make progression purchases more useful.

entries.title: Platform and Quality-of-Life Features
changes: Mobile and console support are available.
Players can switch displayed weights between kilograms and pounds.
The game includes an inventory system and music player.
entries.impact: Players can use their preferred platform and weight unit while keeping consumables organized between sessions.

entries.title: Frequent Fixes and Server Restarts
changes: Live servers may restart when changes are released.
The Roblox community and official Discord are the main announcement channels.
entries.impact: Finish important personal-record attempts before a scheduled restart and rejoin a fresh server after an update is deployed.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Ultimate Gym Game

questions.question: What is Ultimate Gym Game?
questions.answer: Ultimate Gym Game is a Roblox bodybuilding simulator focused on realistic muscle growth, strength training, bulking and cutting across more than 31 exercises, with rank titles progressing from Beginner to Grand Master.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Ultimate Gym Game?
questions.answer: Ultimate Gym Game does not currently list a public code redemption menu. New codes, event rewards and bonus announcements appear through the official Roblox community and Discord server.

questions.question: What exercises can I train in Ultimate Gym Game?
questions.answer: Ultimate Gym Game includes more than 31 exercises, including Bench Press, Squat, Deadlift, Cable Machines, Dumbbells, Pull-Ups, Dips and a calisthenics progression that ends with the Maltese.

questions.question: What are the training zones in Ultimate Gym Game?
questions.answer: Ultimate Gym Game has three training zones: Strength for heavier lifting, Hypertrophy for muscle growth, and Endurance for longer training sessions and stamina.

questions.question: How does bulking and cutting work in Ultimate Gym Game?
questions.answer: In Ultimate Gym Game you can grow muscle during a bulk and reduce size during a cut while keeping major lifts in rotation, so strength progress continues alongside visible body changes.

questions.question: Where can I play Ultimate Gym Game?
questions.answer: Ultimate Gym Game is available on Roblox for desktop, mobile and console. You can switch displayed weights between kilograms and pounds inside the game.
